titles.title: I Just Keep Falling in Love with Him (2)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v4 v1 v2 v5 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I just keep falling in love with Him Over and over and over and over again I keep falling in love with Him Over and over and over and over again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He gets sweeter and sweeter as the days go by Oh what a love between my Lord and I I keep falling in love with Him Over and over and, over and over again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I first fell in love with Jesus, I gave Him all my heart And I thought I couldn’t love him more than I did right at the start. But now I look back over the mountains, and the valleys where I’ve been And It makes me know I love Him so much more than I did then

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's a hand I can hold on to For each valley and each trial. There's a shoulder I can lean upon When I face another mile There's a Love I can depend upon Its fresh and new each day And with love in my heart Its overflowing, that is why I say.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He keeps loving and forgiving me over and Over and over and over and over again He keeps loving and forgiving me over and Over and over and over and over again
